definition: The CustomChangeStrategyRegistry resolved through the injector chain that selects the active Change Strategy per scope, so different subtrees of one app can track changes with different strategies simultaneously (e.g. a form on snapshot-diff, a collaborative document on a CRDT).
usage: Change Tracking Protocol (Web States). Generalizes the validation customValidation:change-detection concern from one form to all observable state. Nearest-scope strategy wins.
